violations.text: The floors in the back stock room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The condensate in the back storage area is in poor repair, per person in charge when it rains it overflows. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

Juice, labeled keep refrigerated, was observed held at 45-48 degrees Fahrenheit in the beverage refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Juice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used to store time/temperature control for safety foods until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
